steps.title: Substitute the given soil volume into the equation
steps.content:
We know $y = 2$ cubic feet. Substitute this into $32x + 81y = 290$:

$$32x + 81(2) = 290$$
$$32x + 162 = 290$$

steps.title: Solve for the mulch volume
steps.content:
Subtract 162 from both sides:

$$32x = 128$$

Divide both sides by 32:

$$x = 4$$

The volume of mulch is 4 cubic feet. That matches choice D — D is correct.
